{{ define "main" }}
{{ i18n "list_section" }}

{{ .Title }}

{{ with .Description }}

{{ . }}

{{ end }}
{{ partial "translation-notice.html" . }}
{{ .Content }}
{{- /* Card grid driven by the primary-language section so untranslated child pages still appear (linked to the primary version with a tag). */ -}} {{- $primary := index hugo.Sites 0 -}} {{- $primaryLang := $primary.Language.Lang -}} {{- $psec := . -}} {{- range .AllTranslations -}}{{- if eq .Language.Lang $primaryLang -}}{{- $psec = . -}}{{- end -}}{{- end -}} {{ with $psec.Pages.ByWeight }}
{{ range . }} {{- $rp := partial "i18n-resolve.html" . -}} {{- $pg := $rp.page -}}
{{ $pg.Title }}{{ if $rp.fallback }} {{ partial "fallback-tag.html" $primaryLang }}{{ end }}
{{ with $pg.Description }}
{{ . }}
{{ end }}
→
 {{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ end }}
